## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the [coding standards](../docs/development/coding-standards.md)
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`./gradlew test` / `ng test`)
- [ ] New code has unit tests (≥ 80 % coverage)
- [ ] Flyway migration added (if DB schema changed)
- [ ] MapStruct mapper updated (if entity fields changed)
- [ ] `@PreAuthorize` added on all new controller methods
- [ ] `branchId` filter present in every new repository query
- [ ] OpenAPI `@Operation` annotation added on new endpoints
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behaviour changes)
